A/N: The early chapters contain logical inconsistencies and a weak storytelling style. Please keep this in mind before you start reading. If you’re curious about my current storytelling and writing style, I recommend checking out the latest chapters instead. I’m planning to do a remake in the future… when I’m not feeling lazy. A/N: Since this is the first novel I’ve published,don’t expect a perfect masterpiece. Still, I believe I’ve managed to create a good story. Sorry guys, the author is too lazy to write a long explanation. In short: the main character is a cursed child whose story will change the fate of the entire world.

records.title: The Elven Evolution: Starting With 1 Million SSSR Skills
records.synopsis: [≈40K words before locked] After dying in an unfortunate accident, the next time Theron opens his eyes, he finds himself in an entirely new world, the novel he had spent hours reading. He had been reborn as the weak elf lord of the lowest race, people set to be wiped out before the first arc even ended. But not anymore… Theron, now Eliron, knows the plot like the back of his hand, he knows all cheats, and all the secrets. But that was not all he brought along with him. [Ding!] [Host has awakened the primordial collection] [INITIATING SKILL COUNT] 1,003,689 SSSR SKILLS COUNTED! With the very knowledge of the future and an arsenal of skills in his possession. Eliron will turn the lives of the wood elves around for good. Because if they must survive in a world plagued by Supernatural monsters and century old dynasties… Then the elves must evolve! Additional tags Kingdom Building || Elves || Slice of life || Politics || War || Romance || Supernatural || Orks || Architecture || Adventure
